_comment: MULTIPLE CHOICE EXERCISE (type: mc) — the most common exercise type (634 in the corpus). Tests recognition: learner sees a prompt and picks from four options.
_wid: The glossary ID of the word being tested. Used to update spaced-repetition proficiency. Required for all mc exercises.
_prompt: The question shown to the learner. Usually 'What does [word] mean?' or 'Which word means [english]?' Vary direction across exercises in the same lesson.
_sub: Short subtitle under the prompt. Usually 'Choose the correct answer'. Required.
_correct: Must match one of the strings in options exactly (case-sensitive).
_options: Four options total. One correct, three plausible distractors from the same semantic field. Never use implausible distractors — they teach nothing. Order: correct answer in a random position (not always first).
cm: Tho niioht! Ohón:ta' — leaf. A-class noun. You will see it in the Thanksgiving Address when we speak of the trees.
_cm: Shown after the learner's second attempt if correct, or after reveal. Begin with an affirmation (Tho niioht!, Io'nikonhraién:ta'ne!, Niawenhkó:wa!). Add one sentence of linguistic or cultural context. Keep under 3 sentences.
wm: That answer is incorrect — please try again.
_wm: Shown after a wrong answer. Keep neutral and brief. On second wrong attempt the correct answer is revealed.

_optional_image._comment: Add an image object only when a visual meaningfully aids recognition (physical objects, animals, places). Omit entirely for abstract words. Image must be freely licensed.
_optional_image.alt: Descriptive alt text that includes the Kanien'kéha word and its meaning.
